headline: Hayden Hackney
body: Everton have completed the signing of Hayden Hackney from Middlesbrough for an initial £16.5m. The deal for the midfielder could rise to just under £25m if all clauses, which are based on appearances, England selection and Everton’s qualification for European competition, are met. Middlesbrough also have a sell-on, based on future profit, as part of the move. He has signed a five-year deal. ✍️ Paddy_Boyland 🔗 nyti.ms/449FGmj
raw_text:
Everton have completed the signing of Hayden Hackney from Middlesbrough for an initial £16.5m.

The deal for the midfielder could rise to just under £25m if all clauses, which are based on appearances, England selection and Everton’s qualification for European competition, are met.

Middlesbrough also have a sell-on, based on future profit, as part of the move. He has signed a five-year deal.

✍️ @Paddy_Boyland 

🔗 nyti.ms/449FGmj
text:
Everton confirm Hayden Hackney as joined for an initial fee of £16.5m from Middlesbrough.
"It feels like a good fit for me," he said. "I think it's a given that you work hard, you run, you make tackles. I'll be doing that."
draft_caption:
✅ TRANSFER- HAYDEN HACKNEY CONFIRMED TRANSFER TO EVERTON.
💰 PRICE — £16.5M
📝 CONTRACT — TBD
